title: Two Merry Adventurers
writer: Robert A. Stemmle, Karl Hartl, Henri Debain
actors: Hans Albers, Heinz Rühmann, Marieluise Claudius
plot: Hans Albers and Heinz Rühmann play two confidence tricksters. They manage to stop a night train for nefarious purposes, and impersonate Sherlock Holmes and Dr Watson. Romantic involvement with two young British female travelers en...
